final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for a young woman character inspired by 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic with Pixar-style sensibilities — exact rendering approach is yours
Composition: must be 3x3 grid layout with 9 panels, each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include a young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, appearing in all 9 panels with distinct expressions and outfits
Scene/backdrop: must include white paper with torn holes as the framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, expressive atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panel variations exactly as specified:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Avoid: must avoid direct replication of copyrighted 赵灵儿 likeness — create an original non-infringing interpretation
